No...that’s not Lara Croft...that’s diet Nathan Drake. 

Lara Croft is an excessively  confident, enormously capable, cocky as hell, force of nature with an itchy trigger finger and weaponized sex appeal. 

She raids forgotten tombs, plunders ancient ruins, and robs the husks of civilizations lost in the annals of time simply because she’s an incredibly wealthy, and exceedingly bored übermensch who goddamn-well feels like it. 

She’s not a “survivor”. She needs to be SURVIVED. 

She doesn’t need to be humanized to be inspiring,
she was inspiring because she was MORE than human. 

She doesn’t need to be vulnerable to be relatable, she’s relatable because she is above vulnerability.

She is an ideal, an icon to be placed on a pedestal, a paragon to be admired and adored. 

She is a beacon of light and hope for girls women all over, showing just how far a person can go if they’re damn good at what they do.
